title: RF elements Symmetrical Horn Sector antenna with TwistPort, 5/6GHz, 18 dBi, 30 °
description: 30 ° Symmetrical Horn Antennas have a symmetrical beam pattern with depressed sidelobes. They offer excellent noise rejection and supreme scalability options.
